text: Last class we learned about shopping and prices.
Today we learn to get around the city.

I can take the bus to work.
She can walk to the office.
I can drive a car.
He cannot drive the train.
Can I take the bus here?
Where is the station?
I want one ticket, please.
Good morning! Welcome to the station. How can I help you?
Hi! Can I take the bus to the center here?
Yes, you can. The bus station is right there.
Great! How much is one ticket?
It is four reais. Do you want a ticket for the train too?
No, thank you. I can walk to the train station later. One bus ticket, please.
I can walk to the office.
I cannot drive a car.

Hello, let me tell you how I get around my city. I live near the center of Altamira. Every morning, I can take the bus to my office. The bus is cheap and the station is near my house. Sometimes I walk, because my office is not very far. I cannot drive a car yet, but I want to learn. On the weekend, I take the train to visit my family. I like to travel and see new places.

Good morning, everyone. Let me tell you about transport in my city. We have buses, trains, and taxis. Many people take the bus to work because it is cheap. You can buy a ticket at the station. The train is fast, but you cannot take it very late at night. I drive a bus every day, and I help people get around the city. I like my job because I meet many people.
Dienane leaves her house in the morning. She walks to the bus station. She buys a ticket. She takes the bus to her office. At night, she takes the train to visit her family.
